description: Low-angle nighttime color photograph (no design overlay or on-image text) shot from near ground level across an asphalt lot. A row of people stands with their backs to the camera under a dark blue night sky: at left several officers in dark uniforms, one with 'POLICE' on the back and another vest reading 'POLICE K-9'; in the center and right, agents in multicam camouflage tactical gear stand among plainclothes men in hoodies and jeans (apparent detainees). A pickup truck with red tail lights and other emergency lighting is parked behind them. The 'POLICE' and 'POLICE K-9' wording is apparel marking in the photograph.
notable_text: POLICE; POLICE K-9 (apparel markings, not designed text)
